stemHtml: For the first issue of a Flight Test Rating, Applicants shall...

options.a: have completed at least 1500 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category, of which at least 500 hours as PIC.
options.b: have completed at least 1000 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category, of which at least 500 hours as PIC.
options.c: have completed at least 1500 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category, of which at least 400 hours as PIC.
options.d: have completed at least 1000 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category, of which at least 400 hours as PIC.
